business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial construction contractor (carpentry, electrical, plumbing, masonry, painting, project management)

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy Number WC-KCB-2025-5580; PCRB Experience Rating; Final Experience Modification Factor 0.86

positives: Experience modification factor of 0.86 (credit mod, below 1.00)

concerns: Multiple high-hazard construction classifications (carpentry, masonry, electrical, plumbing)
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Three years of loss data: 2023-2024 (7 claims, $191,231 incurred); 2022-2023 (3 claims, $116,479 incurred); 2021-2022 (10 claims, $240,694 incurred). Total actual primary losses $335,671; total actual excess losses $212,733.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: PCRB Experience Rating Worksheet for Keystone Commercial Builders, Inc. Rating Organization: Pennsylvania Compensation Rating Bureau. Risk ID 491498-1604. Rating Plan: Large Risk. Final Experience Modification Factor: 0.86.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Operations include Carpentry NOC (Class 5403, payroll $5,915,000), Electrical Wiring (5190, $4,544,000), Plumbing NOC (5183, $3,075,000), Masonry NOC (5022, $6,635,850), Painting Interior (5474, $1,639,000), Contractors Project Manager/Superintendent (5606, $4,776,000), and Clerical Office Employees NOC (8810, $5,010,000). Total payroll $31,594,850.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Policy Year 2023-2024: 7 claims, $190,770 paid, $191,231 incurred, $120,455 primary, $70,776 excess. Policy Year 2022-2023: 3 claims, $115,267 paid, $116,479 incurred, $58,500 primary, $57,979 excess. Policy Year 2021-2022: 10 claims, $240,694 paid/incurred, $156,716 primary, $83,978 excess.
